You asked to remind you about this, have you finished your plan?🤔
Texts.Pipelines:Reminders:Receive:InvalidActio: 😢 Not sure I understand what it means, I will remove reminder and leave item in your list
Texts.Pipelines:Reminders:Receive:TodoItemFini: 😊 Great job, I will remove this item from your list
Texts.Pipelines:Reminders:Receive:ReminderRemo: ✔️ Reminder removed, todo item is still in your list
Texts.Pipelines:Reminders:Receive:RescheduleRe: 🕔 Sure, write me time when you want to receive it. Use 24h format (e.g. 14:36) or press /cancel to just remove reminder
🙂 Sure, I will just remove a reminder
🤔 Hmm, unfortunately I cannot understand what you mean. Use 24h format (e.g. 21:54) or press /cancel to just remove reminder
